font-size: 6.4px; font-family: 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans', 'Liberation Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start; fill: #374151

g.text: No mortality association is interpreted as prognostic validation.

text.style: font-weight: 700; font-size: 7.2px; font-family: 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans', 'Liberation Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start
font-weight: 700; font-size: 6.5px; font-family: 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans', 'Liberation Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: middle; fill: #272727
font-size: 6.4px; font-family: 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans', 'Liberation Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start; fill: #374151

g.text: Do not use pathway coupling as proof of treatment responsiveness.

text.style: font-weight: 700; font-size: 7.2px; font-family: 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans', 'Liberation Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start
font-weight: 700; font-size: 6.5px; font-family: 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans', 'Liberation Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: middle; fill: #272727
font-size: 6.4px; font-family: 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans', 'Liberation Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start; fill: #374151

g.text: T48 evidence is more vulnerable to dropout and recovery-state selection.

text.style: font-weight: 700; font-size: 7.2px; font-family: 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans', 'Liberation Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start
font-weight: 700; font-size: 6.5px; font-family: 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans', 'Liberation Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: middle; fill: #272727
font-size: 6.4px; font-family: 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans', 'Liberation Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start; fill: #374151

g.text: Sampling time must be stated with every score.

text.style: font-weight: 700; font-size: 7.2px; font-family: 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans', 'Liberation Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start
font-weight: 700; font-size: 6.5px; font-family: 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans', 'Liberation Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: middle; fill: #272727
font-size: 6.4px; font-family: 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans', 'Liberation Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start; fill: #374151

g.text: Do not describe as newly validated baseline diagnostic performance.

text.style: font-weight: 700; font-size: 10px; font-family: 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans', 'Liberation Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start

g.text: Context of use for repeated host-response RNA scores

text.style: font-size: 6.5px; font-family: 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans', 'Liberation Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start; fill: #555555

g.text: The current study supports temporal description, not assay thresholds, prognostic validation or treatment decisions.
